tasks.description: Download and install VMware Player from vmware.com. Select the appropriate version for Windows, and follow the installation wizard to set up a virtual machine environment.

tasks.task: Create a New Virtual Machine in VMware Player
tasks.description: Open VMware Player, select 'New' to create a new virtual machine. Choose an appropriate operating system (e.g., Linux) and proceed through the setup wizard to configure settings such as name, memory allocation, storage options, etc.
Visit a reliable website that offers free distributions of Linux. Select an appropriate distribution (e.g., Ubuntu) and follow the installation instructions to download the ISO file.
